Ntc Of Hearing On Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

J. Scott Weaver, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ELDER MARTINEZ, JOSE ANTONIO LAINEZ BARRERA, CONTARINO BARRERA, JOSE URQUILLA, HUGO GRANGENO, IRIS AGUILAR MARROQUIN, DIEGO SALALA, MARIA SANTOS VASQUEZ, FRANCISCO DARA PEREZ, RAFAEL GARCIA, GABRIEL TUPUL SALVADOR.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VALLE-CRISTALIS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations submitted and filed in support of Default Prove-up are admitted in evidence this day.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
1. Plaintiff ELDER MARTINEZ shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $65,000.00.
2. Plaintiff JOSE ANTONIO LAINEZ BARRERA shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $65,000.00.
3. Plaintiff CONTARINO BARRERA shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $64,100.00.
4. Plaintiff JOSE URQUILLA shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $63,600.00.
5. Plaintiff HUGO GRANGENO shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $65,000.00.
6. Plaintiff IRIS AGUILAR MARROQUIN shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $56,300.00.
7. Plaintiff DIEGO SALALA shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $60,725.00.
8. Plaintiff MARIA SANTOS VASQUEZ shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $59,225.00.
9. Plaintiff FRANCISCO DARA PEREZ shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $59,225.00.
10. Plaintiff RAFAEL GARCIA shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $64,650.00.
11. Plaintiff GABRIEL TUPAL SALVADOR shall have judgment against defendant GLORIA C. ARGUETA, aka GLORIA VALLE, aka GLORIA VELLE-CRISTALIS in the amount of $60,725.00.
It is further adjudged that plaintiffs are entitled to judgment for attorney fees in the amountof $20,250.00 and costs of $1,020.00. For a total judgment of $704,820.00.
Judgment signed in open court.
